rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF STEVEN E. LITTMAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Further Report On Status Of Administration
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Personal Representative must appear. No notes to be sent. Issue is failure to file documents requested by the Court at the last hearing: a report on status of the assets, where the assets are, how much they are, supported by bank statements, and a report on the status of the tax filings.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Preliminary Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Order revised as follows: this Court does not rule all allegations are true or that all actions are approved until an accounting is filed; the bond must be filed, not just delivered to Petitioners; bond must be filed prior to making the distribution.
